name: Playwright NHS Automation
postCreateCommand: npm install && npx playwright install --with-deps chromium && npm install -g pm2
postStartCommand: pm2 start ecosystem.config.js --no-autorestart || pm2 restart ecosystem.config.js ; pm2 save ; gh codespace ports visibility 7890:public 8080:public 2>/dev/null || true
pm2 start ecosystem.config.js --no-autorestart || pm2 restart ecosystem.config.js ; pm2 save
pm2 start ecosystem.config.js --no-autorestart || pm2 restart ecosystem.config.js && pm2 save && gh codespace ports visibility 7890 public && gh codespace ports visibility 8080 public || true
pm2 start ecosystem.config.js --no-autorestart || pm2 restart ecosystem.config.js ; pm2 save ; gh codespace ports visibility 7890:public 8080:public -c $CODESPACE_NAME || true
